# Chlorophyll origin and meaning

## Short Teaching Summary
The term 'chlorophyll' comes from Greek words meaning 'green' (chloros) and 'leaf' (phyllon).

## Difficulty
0.00

## Prerequisites
- Chlorophyll is plant life base

## Related Concepts
- Chlorophyll is plant life base (requires)

## Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Best Examples
- None recorded.

## Best Analogy
- The name 'chlorophyll' comes from the French words 'chloros' (color) and 'φυllon' (leaf), indicating its role in nature.
